About Ferensa

A sanctuary built
for you

Ferensa Studio is a private, thoughtfully designed multipurpose space dedicated to wellness, creativity, and connection. Located in Depok, we are your one-stop destination for mindful movement and authentic community.

Our mission is to empower communities, creators, and mindful brands through intentional experiences that celebrate well-being, creativity, and meaningful connection.

Discover Our Story
500+
Happy Members
20+
Weekly Classes

What We Offer

Our Classes

Yoga

Vinyasa, Yin, Slow Flow, and more — for all levels from beginner to advanced.

Explore

Mat Pilates

Build strength, flexibility, and body awareness through precise, mindful movement.

Explore

Meditation

Guided practices for stillness, clarity, and deep inner rest and restoration.

Explore

Sound Healing

Tibetan bowls and sound baths for deep relaxation and energetic renewal.

Explore

Creative Workshops

Seasonal creative events combining wellness with artistic expression.
